svg.title: What happens when you type https://www.google.com
svg.desc: Full request lifecycle diagram from browser to database and back, showing DNS, TCP/IP, Firewall, HTTPS/TLS, Load Balancer, Web Server, App Server, and Database.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the DNS resolution step in detail')
sendPrompt('How does DNS resolution work step by step?')
sendPrompt('What does a firewall do in a web request?')
sendPrompt('How does the TLS handshake work and what does it encrypt?')
sendPrompt('How does a load balancer distribute traffic?')
sendPrompt('What does a web server do with an HTTP request?')
sendPrompt('What does an application server do to generate a web page?')
sendPrompt('What databases does Google use and how are they queried?')

svg.text: Click any step to learn more
